tools.name: incidents.getAdditions
tools.description:
Get the latest additions.

This endpoint only shows unchanged objects.

tools.name: incidents.getChanges
tools.description:
Get the latest updates.

This endpoint only provides the latest change for an object. It does not keep track of previous changes.

tools.name: incidents.getDeletions
tools.description: Get the latest deleted documents

tools.name: incidents.getIncidents
tools.description:
Get the latest updates and additions.

This endpoint only provides the latest incident for an object. It does not keep track of previous incidents.

tools.description: List upcoming matches for the given league

tools.description: List series for the given league

tools.description: List tournaments of the given league
